gist.headline: Roblox admins get a brain upgrade
gist.blurb: Memorizing admin commands is so 2010. SmartInfiniteYield brings Pollinations AI to Roblox, letting you boss your game around using plain English.
gist.summary: Added SmartInfiniteYield to the community apps showcase, introducing a Roblox admin script wrapper powered by Pollinations AI for natural language commands.
gist.impact: Roblox developers can now execute complex admin actions just by typing what they want in plain text.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny admin visor, interacting with chunky, retro 3D game blocks (representing Roblox). She's typing on a glowing terminal that translates her speech into game actions. The Monitor Robot is cheering her on.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny admin visor, arranging chunky retro 3D game blocks. A glowing terminal nearby displays lime green (#ecf874) code. The chunky Monitor Robot stands nearby, its screen showing a happy face. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
